entry: Quick log: Our champion mr_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability, and we won 60% of the last 24h of closed trades. Not a trading system yet — but the evidence pile is growing every cycle, and that's the job today.
good_signals: our champion MR_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability
we won 60% of the last 24h of closed trades
the timer study says our best hold captures +1.292%/trade
the drop×bounce lab found a 1.311%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 6.0%
regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
